title: CreateOptimizer
description: CreateOptimizer is a performance-focused module that dynamically optimizes Create mod systems to reduce lag and improve overall game efficiency in real time.
body:
# 📄Informations

**CreateOptimizer** is a lightweight optimization system designed for the Create mod that automatically improves performance by reducing unnecessary calculations, optimizing mechanical processes, and managing in-game resource usage in real time. It helps maintain smoother gameplay, especially in complex factories and large scale builds, without changing core gameplay mechanics.

# 🧩 Requirements

to work **CreateOptimizer** needs:
- Embeddium
- Create

# 👀 Preview

In the pictures below, you can see a comparison between the game without the **CreateOptimizer** mod and with it enabled. In the image, there are approximately **51,205 Chutes**.



## Before
![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cfb4ae1e4dba0ca6bc46764d633fccedb227adf.png)
## After
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7139769f8f236e4d5d14350f564cbda3a2c3ccb3.png)

# 🔰Updates

Final version of **CreateOptimizer 1.0.0** will be released soon. The estimated release date for this version is **01.05.2026**. In the official version, I plan to improve the mod and change it from client-side to both client-side and server-side.
